reviews.review_description: Great game very addictive but needs a RESUME feature as it ALWAYS overheats the device in 5 minutes and forces you to pull out the device. There is no way to continue your game you must restart.

developer_response.body: Hi ,really sorry about it, due the level streaming in more than 200 different maps ,it overheated sometimes. We will improve with this problem soon.

reviews.review_description: The exit button at the start of the game doesn't event work! Not a good vr game.
Great game please add to quest
Entertained for a few seconds.
Really fun
Amazing game

I'd like that there would be a pause button..so that I can take the Gear off and answer a call or smth..or let the phone to cool..also it would be nice to see a high score board..
My highscore as of today is:12553..

developer_response.body: Thanks for your advice and we will update those soon, your advice is valuable for us, thanks again.

reviews.review_title: I used to love this game
reviews.review_description:
I am using Samsung gear vr be with an s7edge and the download baisicly gets stuck always on 15% (9.5mb) I have played this game on this phone before and it worked now it gets stuck.
I hope there is a way to fix this issue and thank you for listening.

Unlike temple run this doesn't make me feel nauseous. Having lots of fun....however...i would like to see it so thatbwhen you die and you click continue...it doesn't take you to the publisher screen to then click continue again to just to take you back to the menu to click start.

reviews.review_title: its good but not on quest 2
reviews.review_description: can you put this on quest 2?
Thanks so much for making this game compatible with Quest. My son and I had the best time playing this tonight and he walked away with the high score. Everyone should give this game a try.
Quite simple and easy game. It's nice there's a score multiplier which adds to the strategy a bit. It became a little repetitive after awhile though and the hit detection needs some work.
I love this game, the beginning is very easy (kind a boring) but eventually it gets harder and much more exciting.

developer_response.body: Hope you enjoy the difficult part, it should be really hard to go through ,normally after the first night.

reviews.review_description: Best game on VR hands down
It's annoying when your side touches a wall and it ends. And always have to start from the beginning.  Lost interest after 3 tries.
I used to love this game and play it every day, but now it doesn't install!!! I'm on a note s8, some help please I love this game!
This is a great simple game with a great execution. Don't get me wrong, I mean simple in the best way possible!

Successfully Finished The Game. High Score 34512. "Congratulations. You Win. Life is a journey. RUN."

Best Game In Oculus Store.

How is this game free? It has a really nice feel to it and is very playable. I usually don't llike head controls but it works nicely here. This gane is more playable and addictive than some £7.99 games I've played! 

I deducted a star for two reasons, firstly you can't turn off the music and second you start right back at the beginning everytime. It would be nice to have checkpoints but I ain't complaining really as it didn't cost me anything. If you like endless runner type games this is definitely worth a go.
Kind of addicting and it has nice changes when you progress. I would heartly suggest jumps and, first of all, removing score screen in the center or make it very small!
